{
  "claims": [
    "One in five hospitals in California is at risk of closure.",
    "The closure of Madera Community Hospital has left residents with significant consequences, including increased travel for healthcare.",
    "60% of residents had to travel to Fresno to receive their healthcare due to the closure of Madera Community Hospital.",
    "About 15% of residents did not know where to go to receive care following the closure of Madera Community Hospital.",
    "52% of farmworkers report they do not have a reliable way to get to the next hospital.",

    "Senate Bill 774 would prevent the California Attorney General from imposing political conditions on hospital mergers and agreements."
